source.title: CPIC Guideline for Dihydropyrimidine Dehydrogenase and Fluoropyrimidine Dosing
source.finding: DPYD poor metabolizers: reduce fluoropyrimidine dose by 50% or use alternative. Potentially life-threatening toxicity.

AA.effect: Complete DPD deficiency. Life-threatening toxicity with fluoropyrimidines.
AA.recommendation: Avoid fluoropyrimidines entirely. Use alternative chemotherapy.

AG.effect: Partial DPD deficiency. High risk of severe toxicity.
AG.recommendation: Reduce fluoropyrimidine dose by at least 50%. Close monitoring required.

GG.effect: Normal DPD activity. Standard fluoropyrimidine metabolism.

AA.effect: DPYD*13 homozygous. Complete DPD deficiency. Life-threatening fluoropyrimidine toxicity.
AA.recommendation: Avoid fluoropyrimidines entirely. Use alternative chemotherapy.

AT.effect: DPYD*13 heterozygous. Partial DPD deficiency with high risk of severe toxicity.
AT.recommendation: Reduce fluoropyrimidine dose by at least 50%. Close monitoring required.

TA.effect: DPYD*13 heterozygous. Partial DPD deficiency with high risk of severe toxicity.
TA.recommendation: Reduce fluoropyrimidine dose by at least 50%. Close monitoring required.

TT.effect: No DPYD*13 variant. Normal DPD activity.
DPYD c.2846A>T homozygous. Complete DPD deficiency. Life-threatening fluoropyrimidine toxicity.
TT.recommendation: Avoid fluoropyrimidines entirely. Use alternative chemotherapy.

AT.effect: DPYD c.2846A>T heterozygous. Partial DPD deficiency with increased toxicity risk.
AT.recommendation: Reduce fluoropyrimidine dose by at least 50%. Close monitoring required.

TA.effect: DPYD c.2846A>T heterozygous. Partial DPD deficiency with increased toxicity risk.
TA.recommendation: Reduce fluoropyrimidine dose by at least 50%. Close monitoring required.

AA.effect: No c.2846A>T variant. Normal DPD activity.

GG.effect: DPYD HapB3 tag homozygous. Complete DPD deficiency. Life-threatening fluoropyrimidine toxicity.
GG.recommendation: Avoid fluoropyrimidines entirely. Use alternative chemotherapy.

CG.effect: DPYD HapB3 tag heterozygous. Partial DPD deficiency with increased toxicity risk.
CG.recommendation: Reduce fluoropyrimidine dose by at least 50%. Close monitoring required.

GC.effect: DPYD HapB3 tag heterozygous. Partial DPD deficiency with increased toxicity risk.
GC.recommendation: Reduce fluoropyrimidine dose by at least 50%. Close monitoring required.

CC.effect: No HapB3 variant. Normal DPD activity.
